version_surfaces.name: provider_api
version_surfaces.compatibility_policy: Change the provider API name for incompatible transport-level contracts.

version_surfaces.name: local_adapter_api
version_surfaces.compatibility_policy: Change the adapter API name for incompatible local capability envelope contracts.

version_surfaces.name: operation_contracts
version_surfaces.compatibility_policy: Version operation schemas, fixtures, and manifest refs together.

version_surfaces.name: wrapper
version_surfaces.compatibility_policy: Wrapper releases must declare the provider API they support.

examples: Add a new draft read-only operation.
Add an optional input field with a safe default.
Add wrapper support for an existing schema-backed operation.
Remove or rename an operation, required field, error code, side effect, or adapter capability.
Change an operation from read-only to mutating.
Embed private local data in shared artifacts.
